title: AutoWaterDrop
description: Auto-mod for water clutch: he picks up a bucket, puts water under the player when he falls, picks it back up, returns the slot and shows the status in the HUD (G on/off).
body:
The project adds the AutoWaterDrop client Fabric mod for autosaving from falling from a height using a bucket of water.

 Currently, the mod does the following:

Enabling/disabling with the G bind.

 Automatically finds a bucket of water in the hand, hotbar, or main inventory.

 If the bucket is in the inventory, it temporarily swaps it to the active slot.

 During the fall, it automatically attempts to place the water.

Places water only in the column directly below the player.
 After landing/contacting the water, it attempts to automatically collect the water back into the bucket. 

 Returns the selected slot/item after the cycle. 

 Displays the HUD status in the lower-right corner: mod On/Off and whether there is a water bucket. 

 Displays a periodic warning if there is no water bucket (with a background and a smooth fade-out).
